meta_title: For Founders: analytics setup to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to analytics setup and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Analytics for Founders: No-Code Setup Guide
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between no-code and data-driven insights. Master analytics setup using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your SaaS revenue effectively.
content.answer_block: Stop guessing and start measuring. By integrating lightweight analytics via Claude Code and Antigravity, you gain immediate visibility into user behavior without writing manual SQL or complex tracking scripts. This setup transforms your MVP into a revenue-generating engine by identifying exactly where your users drop off.
content.intro:
You’ve built your MVP, but you’re flying blind. Every day without data is a day you’re burning runway on features that don't move the needle. The 'no-code' barrier is a myth—you don't need a CS degree to instrument your app; you just need the right leverage.

We are going to bridge the gap between intuition and reality. Using the raw power of Claude Code and the architectural precision of Antigravity, we will deploy a high-fidelity analytics layer that tracks your North Star metrics automatically. It's time to stop building in the dark and start engineering for growth.

steps.title: Define Your North Star Metric
steps.description: Before writing a single line, define the one action that correlates with revenue. This keeps your tracking lean and focused.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS Growth Architect. Analyze my product model and suggest the 3 most critical conversion events I should track to optimize for MRR.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review my business model and identify the top 3 conversion events for analytics tracking.'

steps.title: Automated Event Schema Generation
steps.description: Generate a consistent event schema so your data remains clean and actionable as you scale.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a standardized analytics event structure that includes user_id, event_name, and metadata properties for my SaaS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create an analytics_schema.json file based on the suggested events.'

steps.title: Inject Analytics Middleware
steps.description: Use AI to inject lightweight tracking logic into your existing codebase without breaking your front-end components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, modular tracking function that can be imported to trigger analytics events across my UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Create a tracking.js utility and wrap my primary CTA components to trigger these events.'

steps.title: Validate Data Pipeline Flow
steps.description: Ensure your events are actually firing by creating a test suite that mocks user behavior.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test script that simulates a user journey and verifies that the analytics events are firing with the correct payload.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a test_analytics.js file to mock user behavior and verify event logging.'

steps.title: Dashboard Integration
steps.description: Connect your event stream to a visualization tool to gain real-time insights into your funnel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide the configuration steps to push these events into a visualization dashboard like PostHog or Mixpanel via API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate the API integration code to push my schema-defined events to PostHog.'

pro_tips: Track 'time-to-first-value' (TTFV) as your primary metric; it is the most accurate predictor of churn.
Avoid tracking everything; focus only on events that signal a user is moving closer to a paid subscription.
Use server-side tracking for critical events to bypass ad-blockers and ensure data integrity.
Implement 'Identity Resolution' early so you can stitch together anonymous and authenticated user sessions.
Automate a weekly alert that emails you your top-performing conversion path to keep your focus on growth.
content.next_steps: Once your analytics are live, run your first A/B test on your landing page headlines to see which drives higher sign-ups.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the technical foundation to scale your product based on hard data rather than assumptions. Don't let your features go unvalidated—start measuring your success today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
